summary: Code review allows APP-265 owner API IPC and live blocker surfacing correction at the current PR head. The product change routes renderer Core/Harbor owner calls through a local-only Electron IPC bridge, keeps non-local/sensitive owner API paths blocked, accepts real Harbor provider catalog guidance without accepting fixture/demo/smoke refs, keeps packaged runtime smoke coverage, and disables live task-start controls for needs-auth/local/fixture identities. It reaches but does not resolve the missing logged-in Harbor identity blocker, so App #265 and App #14 must remain open.
